'''Byrne City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Demophon]]. Located on the continent [[Junno]], Byrne City was domed to protect its denizens from Demophon's fierce atmosphere. The city was connected to Demophon's other major cities through a series of underground tunnels that allowed those fleeing the unstoppable destruction of the planet to arrive at the planet's primary spaceport, [[Byrneport]].

The city was destroyed along with Demophon when the system's star went nova.

{{City-stub}}
